title: Bromometric Estimation of Formates by Oxidation with Bromine
author: R. M. Verma
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A rapid and simple procedure in described for volumetric determination of formate ion based on its oxida­tion by bromine in 20% KBr solution. The hydrobromic acid liberated during oxidation has been estimated by a standard solution of potassium bromate. The procedure is applicable to neutral formate solutions containing 20 to 100 mg. of formic acid with a precision of 0.5% or more. The interference caused by the salts of other organic acids and organic substances has also been investigated.
